qids.subject: Theory of Computation
qids.prose: Consider the following languages. Which one of the following is TRUE? A. is regular and is context- free. B. context- free but not regular and is context-free. C. Neither nor is context- free. D. context- free but is not context-free.

qids.subject: Theory of Computation
qids.prose: Let be a regular language and be a context-free language. Which of the following languages is/are context-free? A. B. C. D.
